automationRules.title: Repair Complete
automationRules.desc: Process electronic signature, email invoice billing, and log replacement part warranty info.

automationRules.title: Part Order Placement
automationRules.desc: Trigger automated parts order request when stock counts fall below 5 for heating elements.

aiSuggestions.message: Refrigerator fan motor parts are low. Dr. Dave Miller cannot complete Charlie's workorder today.

aiSuggestions.message: Bob Marley has refrigerator warranty expiring in 30 days. Recommend sending renewal offers.
